steps.title: Identify the shared shading claim
steps.content: The texts both note that “elderberry bushes provide shade for chia flowers” to shield the plants from harsh desert heat and light.

steps.title: Apply the shared point to the choices
steps.content:
Elderberry bushes can provide shade that protects chia flowers from high-intensity heat and light. directly captures the shared idea that elderberry bushes shade chia flowers, shielding them from harsh heat and light.
The other choices either add unsupported details, reverse the relationship, or introduce points not made by either author.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
